title: Error reading properties of undefined during JSON to CSV conversion
symptom: The script fails with 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')' when trying to process the JSON data.
applies_when: Using JSON data from Twitter API
Converting JSON to CSV in n8n
not_this_if: The JSON data structure is valid and contains expected properties
root_cause: The error occurs because the code attempts to access properties of an undefined object, likely due to the structure of the input JSON not matching the expected format. Specifically, if 'jsonData.data' is undefined, calling 'map' on it will throw this error.
fix_steps: Ensure that the input JSON structure matches the expected format.
Add checks to verify that 'jsonData.data' is defined before calling 'map'.
agent_instruction: Check the input JSON structure and add validation for 'jsonData.data'.
